title: vicia litvinovii
intro: Vicia litvinovii, also known as Litvinov's vetch or Litvinov's pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Vicia litvinovii typically involve drying the plant material and using it in teas, infusions, or as a powder for medicinal purposes.
